## Hidden Features

gcloud commands can be marked as
hidden
(not easily discoverable).

## gcloud Config

`api`
interface. As an alternative, it is possible to explicitly hide certain methods
or resources using
`hidden_features`
definition and the following attributes:

-   `messages`.
    Used to mark as hidden a resource that corresponds to a command group
    (`__init__.py`).
    <br/> *Each API definition will have one resource*.

-   `methods`.
    Used to mark as hidden an RPC that corresponds to a command
    (`command.yaml`).
    <br/>
    *Each API definition can have multiple methods acting upon the resource*.

## YAML Output

*   Command group is set to hidden hidden when resource message is hidden

```
@base.ReleaseTracks(base.ReleaseTrack.GA)
@base.Autogenerated
@base.Hidden
class HiddenCommandGa(base.Group):
  """Manage Hidden Command resources."""
```

*   Command is hidden when method is set to hidden

```
- release_tracks:
  - GA
  auto_generated: true
  hidden: true
  help_text:
    brief: Describe resources
    description: Describe a resource
    examples: |-
      To describe the resource, run:

      $ {command}
  arguments:
    ...
```

*   Flag is set to hidden when field is to hidden

```
- release_tracks:
  - GA
  auto_generated: true
  help_text:
    brief: Describe resources
    description: Describe a resource
    examples: |-
      To describe the resource, run:

      $ {command}
  arguments:
    params:
    - arg_name: hidden-field
      api_field: visibleResource.hiddenField
      required: false
      repeated: false
      help_text: |-
        Hidden field.
      hidden: true
```
